title: Qang qahsa
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Qang qahsas''' were specialized [[qahsa]]s used by the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Overview==
Similar to the [[qahsa]]s, the Qang qahsas were designed to hold all the information as the [[Shaping protocol|protocols]] of the [[shaper caste]]. They normally contained five primary cortexes of knowledge that were accessible to all Shapers with the two additional inner cortexes only being accessed by [[Master Shaper]]s. The very core of the Qang qahsa contained the [[eighth cortex]] which contained the most sacred protocols said to have been bestowed on the [[Species/Legends|species]] by the [[Yun'o|gods]].

The knowledge within them was maintained through use of massive [[Rikyam]] brains.

==History==
What was unknown to the majority of Yuuzhan Vong was that the Qang qahsa did not come from their gods. It did contain all the knowledge that was bestowed upon the [[Ur-Yuuzhan Vong]] millennia ago which was used to defeat a machine race back on [[Yuuzhan'tar]].

Since that time, the origins of the Qang qahsa was lost to future generations who began to revere the gods above all else. The information from the Qang qahsa was also then bestowed upon the shapers who created the living servants of their race so that they could thrive and prosper. It was also said that the [[eighth cortex]] in the Qang qahsa contained necessary knowledge for the Yuuzhan Vong to survive grave threats but in truth it was almost empty.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
